choice: Login magic-links expire in 15 minutes and are single-use; a successful login opens a ~30-day sliding session (renewed on activity) with an explicit logout, after which a fresh magic-link is required.
rationale: The invite token deliberately has no expiry (it's a standing invitation that lives in the account), but a login link is a live credential and must be short-lived and single-use to limit the window for interception/replay. A 30-day sliding session is the usual comfort/security balance for a low-frequency personal-finance tool that no public attacker can even reach an account page for.
